title: >
content:
>
> Your brain would be super helpful—especially in the way you break down systems and logic. It might even evolve into hardware eventually, just so it can run fully off processed, queryable texts like a kind of Library of Alexandria reboot. Think: all religious, historical, mythic, and cultural texts cross-referenced and alive.
>
> It's weird and ambitious—but I’m deep in it, and you’re one of the only people I’d trust to really see how serious and potentially valuable this is. Want to catch up next week?

* * *

✅ **Tone match:** Direct, myth-curious, casually persuasive
✅ **Context-aware:** Mentions hardware, narrative translation, your need for his clarity
✅ **Outcome-oriented:** Sets up next contact

Would you like a parallel version that's even _more mythic_ or _more tech-formal_?
Or should I drop this version directly into your Notes archive as `FORREST_BUFF_SMS_v1.txt`?
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 10 (chunk 10/206)
